body.title: DickSimnel: wire pre-inference assembler
body.result: DickSimnel loads sprint-ticket/SKILL.md as system prompt — already includes pre_inference_assemble.py call; parity automatic
body.intention: I intend that DickSimnel's sprint process calls the same pre-inference assembler as CC so both agents start each sprint with identical pre-assembled context.
body.description:
Wire pre_inference_assemble.py into DickSimnel's sprint skill (wherever it lives — discovery step in sprint). DickSimnel and CC should call the same assembler script; no DickSimnel-specific logic needed beyond the call.

**Affected files:** TBD — DickSimnel sprint skill location (discovery step in sprint)

**Design rules:** none apply

**Scope boundary:** In scope: call assembler from DickSimnel sprint, verify output matches CC format. Out of scope: DickSimnel-specific context additions, any changes to the assembler itself.

**Completion criteria:** DickSimnel sprint transcript shows the same pre-assembled context block format as CC sprint; confirmed by running a DickSimnel sprint on a known ticket and reading the transcript.
